review_title: Amazing company and people behind it
description: Its amazing. As an IT company, we are happy that we found this company. Please keep up your good work, especially fast, friendly, and useful support service. This is what is missing nowadays (you normally talk to robots a lot).
author: Max E.
pros: Very fast support, flawless banking experience, virtual and physical cards, fast payment processing.
cons: I'd like to see the transaction search functionality right inside the app/web without exporting it to PDFs first.

review_title: Intergiro - superb online banking with multiple currencies
description: Excellent - superb platform, processes transactions quickly, excellent customer support.
author: Ralph S.
pros: Everything is simple and efficient. Customer service is excellent. Initial account application, setup and ongoing due diligence was reasonable and efficient. A very good platform and helpful staff.
cons: No real dislikes. It would be good if in due course transfers from USD account can be made directly to EUR SEPA account without transiting through EUR SWIFT account, as this sometimes takes time and results in having to check back to see status of funds reaching the EUR SEPA and then making the payment to the third party. Not a big problem but would be easier if can transfer direct and quickly from USD to EUR SEPA to make the payment to third party without needing to check back on the intermediate transfer from EUR SWIFT.

description: The onboarding was easy and pretty straight forward. I would really like to use them more, but as there are imporant functions missing this is difficult.
author: Christian S.
pros: I like the clean interface and the ease of use.
cons: There are still missing functionalities, like recurring payments and saving payments. Also the credit card is a kind of "prepaid" card and does not work everywhere. This is a huge downside compared to other providers like Wise.

description: From opening the account until daily use: Our overall experience is excellent.
author: Thomas B.
pros: We wanted to separate our investment-account from our regular business account. The support was fast and perfect.
cons: There is nothing, we are not satisfied with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: First class support. First class experience.I love to travel first class!
author: Valentino B.
pros: Speed of transactions between Sepa and SwiftInstant real time currency exchangesMoron proof UI
cons: Restrictions on transactions with certain countries. Would love to see SGD on the list of currencies.

author: Pavels V.
pros: Swedish regulation, mobile access. Client support
cons: No swift copies or payment confirmations in pdf.

author: Philip G.
pros: The big advantage and decision for the purchase was the API, which allows our internal processes to be fully automated
cons: Credit cards are only issued via Mastercard, Visa would be desirable

author: Aivars S.
pros: ease navigate between accounts solid PDF statement
cons: in csv export format counterpart account No in unique format

description: super positive, Indeed I will stay an intergiro customer
author: Grazia M.
pros: Easy to use, clear and transparent! CS is very supportive and they reply very fast solving all your issues
cons: Can't think any to be honest! I have a few little issues but they were all solved
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Saturnin B.
pros: C'est un tres bon logiciel Qui facilite le paiement
cons: Je recommande ce tres fiable logiciel au utilisateur.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Intergiro est un logiciel de gestion des dépenses dans mon entreprise
author: Expedit A.
pros: Intergiro est un logiciel de gestionnaire des ressources humaines
cons: Intergiro est un logiciel de très bonnes performances des dépenses
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Logiciel de service bancaires en ligne
author: Senami B.
pros: Intergiro est un bon logiciel. C'est un logiciel recommandé car il fait partie des meilleurs logiciel de gestions de service bancaires en ligne.
cons: Intergiro est un logiciel qui n'est pas très coûteux et qui est facile d'accès aussi.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
